block_03: Find patterns in the chaos of price swings
block_04: Most traders tend to use the same technical indicators all the time. However, by including new tools in your strategy, you may significantly increase the chances of success.
block_05: Fractal Chaos Bands is an effective tool that traders often overlook. It can filter out minor price changes that don’t affect the main trend. This may help you control the chaos of market swings and focus on the patterns that point to trading opportunities. Learn how to apply this indicator and test it in your strategy to boost your results today.
block_09: Fractal Chaos Bands + Moving Average = More Precision. You can combine Fractal Chaos Bands with other indicators such as the Moving Average to get more accurate signals. What does the chart tell you now?
